title: Stardew Valley Fishing Data Pack
description: A data pack that adds the Stardew Valley Fishing Minigame whenever a fish or other item would normally be fished. Credit to SethBling for the mechanics 4 years ago
body:
This data pack adds a fishing mini-game where you must keep the reel bar under the fish by sneaking to raise the bar. Once the reel meter at the top is full, the item/fish can be caught.

Sethbling is behind the mechanics of this datapack, since he came up with the idea in 2018 (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ebs84exNOAA&ab_channel=SethBling)

I updated it and its visuals to fit with Stardew Valley.

Credit to ConcernedApe for all textures and music that are from Stardew Valley
